description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image and defines three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a lint job that runs the command `python setup.py flake8`. In the test stage add a test job that runs `python setup.py test`. In the deploy stage add a staging job that only runs on the master branch, updates apt with `apt-get update -qy`, installs Ruby development packages with `apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ruby-dev rubygems`, installs the dpl gem via `gem install dpl`, and finally deploys to Heroku using `dpl --provider=heroku --app=sir-bot-a-lot --api-key=$HEROKU_STAGING_API_KEY`.
